item.title: Integration provider management — swap providers without behavior changes
steps: Verify integrate module exists (types.ts, providers.ts, lifecycle.ts, index.ts)
Verify CLI command registered in cli/index.ts
Run full test suite — 1498 tests pass
acceptanceCriteria: integrate add walks through provider selection and credential setup
integrate swap changes provider without changing category interface
integrate remove cleans credentials and tightens egress firewall
integrate list shows health and status
No stubs or TODOs in lifecycle.ts/providers.ts
